assembly_context.name: 27inch_Monitor_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 27英寸显示器装配体，包含屏幕面板、两段式可调节立柱、圆形底座及VESA安装背板。支持左右旋转配合，立柱模拟上下调节后的固定状态。

global_coordinate_system.y_direction: Right side of Monitor (from front view)

design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for API calls.
Use XY plane as horizontal base for all parts unless specified.
Ensure concentricity for all cylindrical connections.
Screen panel is fixed relative to bracket; rotation is simulated by bracket orientation.

instances.name: Outer Tube Instance
instances.placement_notes: Sits on base. Axis aligned with Z.

part.name: Stand Column Outer Tube
part.function: Outer sleeve of the height-adjustable stand.
part.shape: Hollow cylinder (tube). Outer diameter 40mm, Inner diameter slightly larger than 30mm (e.g., 32mm) to allow inner tube insertion. Height 200mm.

faces.name: outer_tube_top_face
faces.purpose: Reference for inner tube extension limit.

axes.name: outer_tube_center_axis
axes.purpose: Concentric axis for mating with base and inner tube.

assembly_relation_notes: Bottom face coincident with Base Top Face.
Center axis concentric with Base Center Axis.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Sketch two concentric circles on XY plane: OD 40mm, ID 32mm.
